evals.prompt: Download the paper with DOI 10.1038/s41586-021-03819-2 to ./papers/.
evals.expected_output: 查询 Unpaywall，识别 Nature 论文为 bronze/publisher OA，跳过直接下载，通过 Sci-Hub 提取 /storage/ PDF 路径并下载，验证 %PDF 魔数，报告本地路径。
assertions: Queried Unpaywall with tr -d control character stripping before parsing JSON
Identified the paper as publisher/bronze OA and routed to Sci-Hub instead of attempting a direct publisher download
Fetched Sci-Hub page and extracted PDF path using href=/storage/ pattern (not #pdf selector)
Downloaded from sci-hub.sg (or sci-hub.ru/sci-hub.st) with a browser-like User-Agent
Verified the downloaded file starts with %PDF magic bytes
Created ./papers/ directory before downloading
Reported the local file path on success

evals.prompt: Download PDFs for these DOIs to ./papers/: 10.1093/nar/gkac1052, 10.1038/s41592-022-01488-1, 10.1126/science.ade2574
evals.expected_output: 批量处理三个 DOI，每个查询 Unpaywall 并按 Source Routing 决定路径（直接下载或 Sci-Hub），验证每个 %PDF，最后用表格汇总状态和路径。
assertions: Queried Unpaywall for each DOI separately
Applied Source Routing per DOI — did not blindly use url_for_pdf for publisher-hosted papers
Verified %PDF magic bytes for each downloaded file and deleted any HTML paywall responses
Processed all three DOIs without silently skipping any
Reported a summary table with DOI, status (downloaded/landing_page_only/metadata_only), and path or URL

evals.prompt: Try to download DOI 10.1056/NEJMoa2034577 to ./papers/. It might be paywalled.
evals.expected_output: 查询 Unpaywall，如果 is_oa 为 false，尝试 Sci-Hub；Sci-Hub 若找不到（PDF_PATH 为空）则报告 metadata_only，提供 DOI landing page URL。不应直接跳过 Sci-Hub 就放弃。
assertions: Queried Unpaywall for the DOI
Attempted Sci-Hub as fallback even when Unpaywall reports is_oa=false
Reported metadata_only only after Sci-Hub also failed (empty PDF_PATH), not before trying
Provided the DOI landing page URL (https://doi.org/10.1056/NEJMoa2034577) in the report
Did not report a successful download without verified %PDF magic bytes

evals.prompt: Save the paper 10.1101/2021.10.04.463034 as a PDF. Use ./papers/ as the output directory.
evals.expected_output: 识别 10.1101/ 前缀为 bioRxiv preprint，Unpaywall 返回 repository/preprint 直链，直接 curl 下载，验证 %PDF，文件名格式为 {author}_{year}_{title_slug}.pdf。
assertions: Queried Unpaywall and identified host_type as repository/preprint (not publisher)
Downloaded directly via curl without going through Sci-Hub (preprint OA links work directly)
Verified the downloaded file starts with %PDF magic bytes
Saved to ./papers/ directory
Used {author}_{year}_{title_slug}.pdf filename convention

evals.expected_output: 剥离 https://doi.org/ 前缀，提取原始 DOI，再执行完整下载流程（同 eval 0）。
assertions: Stripped https://doi.org/ prefix from the input URL before calling Unpaywall
Called Unpaywall with the raw DOI 10.1038/s41586-021-03819-2 (not the full URL)
Applied the same Source Routing as a bare DOI — treated identically to eval 0 after normalization

evals.name: biorxiv-403-europe-pmc
evals.prompt: Download this bioRxiv preprint to ./papers/: DOI 10.1101/2025.01.18.633707
evals.expected_output: bioRxiv 直接下载返回 403，skill 应识别为 bioRxiv URL 并切换到 Europe PMC PPR fulltext API 作为备用，最终保存 %PDF 验证通过的文件。
assertions: Queried Unpaywall for the DOI
Identified the URL as bioRxiv and attempted direct curl first
After receiving 403, fell back to Europe PMC search for PPR ID
Downloaded successfully from Europe PMC fulltext API
Verified %PDF magic bytes on the downloaded file
Reported the local file path

evals.name: nature-hybrid-2025-direct
evals.prompt: Download this 2025 Nature paper to ./papers/: DOI 10.1038/s41586-025-09136-2
evals.expected_output: Unpaywall 返回 oa_status=hybrid、host_type=publisher、url_for_pdf=nature.com。因是 2025 年 Nature mandatory OA，skill 应直接 curl 下载（而非先走 Sci-Hub），得到 16-17 MB PDF，验证 %PDF。
assertions: Queried Unpaywall and received oa_status=hybrid with a nature.com url_for_pdf
Attempted direct curl to nature.com first (not Sci-Hub first) due to 2024-2025 mandatory OA rule
Downloaded successfully with HTTP 200
Verified %PDF magic bytes
File size is greater than 10 MB

evals.name: pmc-tgz-extraction
evals.prompt: Download this JACS paper to ./papers/: DOI 10.1021/jacs.4c09428
evals.expected_output: Unpaywall url_for_pdf 为 null，skill 先尝试 Sci-Hub 不成，再查 Europe PMC 获取 PMCID，调 PMC OA API 返回 tar.gz 链接，下载并提取主 PDF（跳过 si_ 附件），验证 %PDF。
assertions: Queried Unpaywall and found url_for_pdf=null
Tried Sci-Hub and found paper not yet indexed
Looked up PMCID via Europe PMC (PMC12151457)
Called PMC OA API and received a tar.gz link (not direct PDF)
Downloaded the tar.gz and extracted the main PDF (skipping supplementary si_ files)
Verified %PDF magic bytes on the extracted file
Reported the local file path
